    Minjun Chang

    Ph.D. student at Georgia Tech RICAL. Robotics, locomotion, autonomous systems.

    • Atlanta, GA, USA
    • Georgia Institute of Technology
    • Email
    • GitHub

    Achievements

    Honors

    • Federico Stubbe Graduate Student Fellowship, Georgia Institute of Technology.
    • Next Generation Engineer, Institute for Promotion of Engineering and Science of Korea.

    Awards

    1. National ICT Smart Device Competition, Grand Prize (1st place), 2024, Ministry of Science and ICT  ·  granted by the Minister of Science and ICT.
    2. Autonomous Robot Racing Competition, 2nd Match 2022, Grand Prize (1st place), 2022, Korea Robot Society.
    3. IHEI Show Off Festa 2, Best Choice Award, 2021, IHEI Yonsei.
    4. Hanium Competition, Selection, 2021, Federation of Korea Information Industries.
    5. MEDICAL HACK 2021, Excellence Prize, 2021, Busan City.
    6. Yonsei IHEI Workstation, Impact Solution Award, 2021, IHEI Yonsei.
    7. KU Medical Hackathon, Excellence Prize, 2020, Konkuk Univ. Hospital.
    8. EDISON Computer Aided Design Competition, Top 8, 2020, K-MOOC.
    9. IHEI Summer Workstation – ACUOUS, Excellence Award, 2020, IHEI Yonsei.
    10. YonseiXNexon Creative Platform, Excellence Prize, 2019, RC Committee.

    Licenses

    • Engineer Information Processing  ·  HRDK, No. 23202070834M.
    • Pilot of Ultra-Light Vehicle  ·  Korea Transportation Safety Authority, No. 91-071285  ·  authorized drone pilot under 20 kg.
    • Advanced Diver & Diver Propulsion Vehicle  ·  PADI, No. #710657  ·  authorized to dive 60 m underwater and drive a DPV.
